page.subtitle: Create side-by-side pricing plan cards with native Wix Pricing Plans checkout
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Display beautiful pricing tables on your site with native Wix Pricing Plans checkout.
onboarding.step1Desc: Create 3-4 pricing cards with features, prices, and CTAs.
onboarding.step2Desc: Pick a theme, colors, and card style to match your brand.
onboarding.allSetDesc: Save your configuration and add the widget to your site.

howTo.title: Getting started
howTo.step1Desc: Create each pricing tier with name, price, features, and a CTA.
howTo.step2Desc: For checkout CTAs, map each card to a Wix Pricing Plan from the dropdown.
howTo.step3Desc: Choose theme, colors, and card style in the Design settings section.
howTo.step4Desc: Save your settings and add the Pricing Plans Compare widget to any page.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do I need Wix Pricing Plans installed?
faq.a1: Only if you use the Wix checkout CTA mode. Custom URL and contact form CTAs work without it.
faq.q2: How many plan cards can I add on the free plan?
faq.a2: The free plan supports up to 3 plan cards. Premium unlocks unlimited cards.
faq.a3: Premium unlocks Most Popular, New, and Crown badges on individual cards.
faq.a4: Yes. Toggle Highlight on any card to make it taller with an accent border and larger CTA.
faq.a5: Wix Pricing Plan checkout, a custom URL, or a contact form modal.
faq.q6: Does the free plan show a watermark?
faq.a6: Yes. Premium removes the footer watermark from the site widget.
